string.text:
The Magnum SP-5 Pistol is a semi-automatic, recoil-operated, magazine-fed, large-caliber handgun. Known for it's excellent performance in battle, sometimes even replacing the main gun of some soldiers, the SP-5 has a lot of firepower for it's compact size, althought the nature of the firearm makes it a bit exclusive. The weapon has a polymer handle, along with a titanium alloy body and an electroless nickel-plate finish. The sidearm fires the 9x39 SP-5 rounds from a 12-round magazine.

 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Gemtech Supressor
Titanium alloy made magazine that hold 12 9x39 SP-5 rounds for the SP-5 Magnum handgun.
